notes.subject: L-Rev 5/14 + VO-Rec-BOSS Alpha-Ohio Valley 5/15 + L-Rev 5/15 — all open
notes.body: Three CrunchTime tasks overdue as of Saturday: L-Rev 5/14, VO-Rec-BOSS Alpha-Ohio Valley 5/15, L-Rev 5/15. Log into NetChef and clear today.

notes.subject: L3 Courtesy Complaint RESOLVED
notes.body: Brad replied 'Got it, appreciate the update!' — L3 courtesy/friendliness of staff complaint for Louisville KY (Dixie Highway) is closed. Good resolution.

notes.subject: Five Guys Games Crowns 2026 World Champion
notes.body: Celebrating John's achievement — Five Guys Games 2026 World Champion. Brad hopes to see our team bring home the money next time!

notes.subject: Volume + Steritech Walk + Blackberry Countdown (2 days to POS activation)
notes.body: Big Saturday volume. Steritech walk: hand sinks handwashing ONLY, DayMark dates correct, potato cutter/slicer blades chip-free, restroom hourly named owner. Blackberry POS activates Monday 5/18 — confirm team is trained, mix on bottom row, coffee pumps live, comm-board guide posted. Sales +10.2% vs LY this week.

notes.subject: Steritechs at 475 — 100 food safety, 4 MMCCA
notes.body: Store 475 acing their Steritech — 100 food safety, 4 on MMCCA. JP Estep: 'Who dat rising in the FG national Store Rankings.' Reminder of what's possible — Dixie has been making similar moves.
